feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Assignment of Existing Sales Group to Another Sales Office in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Support Team,

I would like to request guidance regarding the assignment of a Sales Group in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Currently, a Sales Group is already assigned to a specific Sales Office. We need to understand how to assign this same Sales Group to an additional Sales Office.

From our analysis in CBC, it appears that once a Sales Group is assigned to a Sales Office, no further changes or reassignments are possible. 

regards

Daniele

entry.title: SAP S4Hana Public Cloud - Custom Analytical Queries and Services, Default to Previous Month?
entry.content: In the old App "Custom Analytical Queries", I am able to set a date filter with a Default Value of "relative: Previous Month". How do I do this in the new "Custom Analytical Queries and Services" App?

entry.title: Defining BELNR and XBLNR intervals for a manually created bank statement
entry.content:
Hi all,

How can we ensure BELNR and XBLNR intervals are defined for a bank statement that is created manually through Manage Bank Statements > Create?

We have a recurring issue with one of our bank statements in which transactions are being automatically allocated to the wrong debtor accounts. This particular bank statement is created manually by uploading an Excel file through Manage Bank Statement > Create. 

In the past we had this issue with our other bank accounts but resolved it by restricting the number ranges under Electronic Bank Statements > Parameter Set Definition. However, the issue persists with the bank statement we are creating manually, so it seems to be bypassing these settings.

This note 2979670 - Error : "The difference is too large for clearing" in Reprocess Bank Statement Items app - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - SAP for Me advises how to restrict the number range intervals when using Upload Bank Statements and Manage Incoming Payment Files, but does not mention how to do it when using the Manage Bank Statement app.

We are using S4Hana Cloud Public.

Also - we're not interested in setting up processing rules at the moment - the posting rules and interpretation algorithms are working fine for the bank statements where the defined number ranges aren't being ignored.

Is anyone able to please advise?

entry.title: Request for Flexible Posting Period Control (Plant-wise/User-wise) in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

Greetings.

We would like to raise a request regarding posting period control flexibility in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Business Requirement:
Currently, our client operates multiple plants running in three shifts. Due to operational constraints, production postings for the 3rd shift on the last day of the month are completed only on the following day.

At the same time, the subsequent posting period needs to be opened immediately to enable timely customer invoicing. This creates a risk where production-related postings may inadvertently be recorded in the next period instead of the intended previous period.

Challenge:
In the current standard system behavior, posting period control is maintained at a global/company code level without sufficient flexibility for:

  • Plant-wise period control

  • User-specific authorization for posting in different periods

Business Impact:

  • Risk of incorrect fi

entry.title: Billing Split issue solution order management
entry.content:
Hi folks, 

we are exploring the scope item #4GT Solution order management and are facing a billing split of the

  • service item and
  • sales item

The situation is displayed within the attached screenshots. 

  • the customer reference of the solution order has not been copied to sales order
  • trying to bill service item and delivery item results in a billing split -  split analysis please find attached. 

What is the designated way to bill the solution order items together within one billing document?
Do we have to implement Cloud BAdI SD_BIL_DATA_TRANSFER to align the header fields between billing request and delivery document?

Best regards

Alex

entry.title: Updating Stock Type / System Status in Material Serial Number via API
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I'm currently working with the Material Serial Number object using the following API:

/MaterialSerialNumber/{Material}/{SerialNumber} (PATCH – Update entity in MaterialSerialNumber) (https://api.sap.com/api/CE_API_MATERIALSERIALNUMBER_0001/path/patch_MaterialSerialNumber__Material___SerialNumber_)

With this API, we are able to update certain fields such as storage location and plant. However, we are facing limitations when it comes to the following fields:

  • Stock Type
  • System Status

Specifically:

  • We are unable to clear or update the Stock Type field.
  • We are also not sure whether System Status can be manipulated via any API.

My questions are:

  1. Is there any API available that allows updating or clearing the Stock Type for a serialized material?
  2. Can System Status be changed programmatically via an API?
  3. Or are these fields strictly controlled by goods movements / inventory transactions and therefore not directly editable?

Any guidance or relevant API recommendations would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

BR,
Evrim

fyi @Caner_Demircan

entry.title: Poland KSeF eDocument Cockpit - "The data object could not be created: The type does not exist"
entry.content:
We are implementing Poland KSeF e-invoicing on S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition using SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, following the official SAP documentation  and note 3708755. Authentication is via KSeF certificate.

The setup works perfectly in our test system. In production, however, every attempt to submit or display the XML of a Poland KSeF eInvoice in the eDocument Cockpit fails with:

"The data object could not be created: The type  does not exist. Message no. EDOCUMENT000"

Notice the double space between the words "type" and "does".

We have deleted and recreated all settings multiple times, always with identical results. We are confident the configuration is correct — the test system proves it.

Our experience with SAP Support so far has been frustrating. We first raised this case on April 9th. After nearly a month, we still have no resolution, no committed timeline, and no feedback from any technical team, with the case being bounced from one department to another. When we pushed for an update, we were informally told that the root cause is likely already known internally — yet no fix has been delivered, and no transparent communication has been proactively shared with us. For a production blocker with direct legal and financial consequences — KSeF compliance is now mandatory in Poland — this is simply not acceptable.

We would like to know:

  • Is anyone else experiencing this exact error in production while the test system works fine?
  • Has anyone found a workaround or received a fix from SAP?
  • Are there any clues about which specific component or setting causes the test/production discrepancy?

Any input is deeply appreciated

entry.title: Dunning sample print was sent to customer
entry.content:
Hello,

one of our clients created a sample print for a dunning. Then they clicked on "Print" in the Schedule Sample Printout Pop-Up.

 

After that, the dunning note was sent per mail to the customers.

How can we change the settings or output parameter definition, that this will not happen again?

Kind regards

entry.title: Document Info Records Lab Field
entry.content:
Hi everyone, is it still possible in the SAP Public Cloud to specify the lab (ref. Material Master Basic Data 1) when creating Document info records?
Compared to ECC, my client is missing the “Lab” field in CV01N or the Fiori app.

Thank You!

entry.title: Report FINS_SWITCH_XLGCLR in Public Cloud / Field OI per Ledger
entry.content:
Hi,

I was searching for the Report FINS_SWITCH_XLGCLR in Public Cloud but could not find any information. So their is an SAP Note 3411581 about changing the field for open item management per ledger when their is an error message if the change is not possible. So in Private Cloud their was the report FINS_SWITCH_XLGCLR, is their something similar in Public Cloud?

 

With best regards,

Josi

entry.title: Extensibility options for SAP Real Estate in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello.

I am currently working with SAP Real Estate in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and analyzing the available extensibility options, especially for scenarios that have an impact on Financial Accounting (FI).

 
After reviewing the released Business Contexts in the system, and also checking the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, I noticed the following:
  • There is no Business Context available for SAP Real Estate objects to be used as Usable Objects, which limits their reuse in custom developments.
  • The number of released enhancement options for SAP Real Estate is quite limited, especially for scenarios affecting accounting behavior.
  • Based on what is available in the system, the enhancement options / BAdIs I can see are, for example:
    • BADI_RECE_VALUATION_PARAMETER (valuation parameter settings)
    • BADI_RECN_CONTRACT_CHECK_ALL
    • BADI_RECN_CONTRACT_SUBSTITUTE
    • REGO_CFD_RO_RAP_FEATURES (visibility control for Real Estate Rentable Object)

Given this situation, I would like to better understand SAP’s intended extensibility strategy for Real Estate in the public cloud:

  • What are the recommended extensibility approaches for extending Real Estate processes that have an impact on FI?
  • Are there any released APIs, BAdIs, or events specifically intended for SAP Real Estate extensibility in the public cloud, beyond the limited set currently available in the system?
  • Is there any roadmap or best-practice documentation explaining how SAP expects customer-specific accounting logic to be implemented for Real Estate scenarios in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
  • Is the absence of a Business Context for exposing SAP Real Estate objects as Usable Objects intentional, and is there any plan to provide such a Business Context in the future?

Any clarification or guidance would be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Can we please use the 'old' Custom Analytical Queries App to create new Queries again?
entry.content:
One problem I see is that SAP has two apps. One named "Custom Analytical Queries" and another one named "Custom Analytical Queries and Services". Within "Custom Analytical Queries", you can no-longer create new Queries. The issue is that "Custom Analytical Queries and Services" does not have the Aggregation options for some of the elements.

I keep running into situations where the older app would have worked better for me and the new app, keeps missing features. 

Is there a way to turn the old one 'back on' until the new app has more functionality that I miss from the old?

entry.title: Use of Pegging for Demand-to-Procurement Traceability in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
I am currently facing a challenge in the area of MRP and procurement in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition.
In my scenario, I have multiple demands (e.g. reservations A, B, and C). Due to a supplier’s minimum order quantity (e.g. X pieces), I procure the required quantity to stock via a purchase order.
My key question is:
How can I transparently identify which purchase order (e.g. PO 123 or PO 127 or PO 129) is actually covering which specific demand (e.g. material Y for reservation A)?
From my perspective, the standard stock/requirements list (MD04) is not sufficient for this purpose.
I understand that pegging could potentially provide better transparency, as it logically links receipts and requirements and represents the material flow structure.
However, I have several questions in this context:
1. How is advanced planning (PP/DS) activated and licensed in the Public Cloud environment (screenshot below)?
2. Are there recommended best practices or alternative approaches to achieve end-to-end transparency between demand and procurement elements?
I am aware that dynamic pegging can be recalculated during planning runs and therefore may not provide stable traceability, whereas fixed pegging would better support this requirement.
I would highly appreciate any insights, recommendations, or practical experiences regarding this topic.
Thank you in advance.
Best regards,
Markus

entry.title: UMB operation and CKMLCP: PUP goes back to old price
entry.content:
Hi experts,

In S4HANA Public Cloud client, with actual costing activated, for a 3S Material:

If in a month X I have an initial stock of 1,000 units at €1/unit, I revalue it with MR21 to €1.2/unit (entry: €200 (balance account/BSX) to (price difference account/UMB) €200), and there are no further goods movements, when I run the ML closing it will post that price difference back to inventory (€200 (acct. price difference/PRY) to (acct. 300*/BSX) €200). In other words, the inventory value at the end of the month (PUP, AT actual valuation) will go back to the initial price of €1 instead of €1.2, which is the correct one.

Does that make sense?

In the following month (X+1), with the second posting made by ML, it will reverse that last entry (BSX to PRY), so it will go back to €1.2 (correct), but the price difference will be carried forward to this month X+1, which means that when ML is run again for month X+1, if there are no movements neither, the PUP will drop again to €1 in the month-end valuation!

This is making me question whether the postings made when you perform an MR21 or release a standard cost (CK40N) actually make sense.

PD: All this despite knowing that standard cost will always be 1,2€ from MR21 execution on.

Is this the standard way of posting MR21 and CK40N release? What can I do so that PUP becomes the correct price 1,2€?

entry.title: how to add the fields in the maintain email template app
entry.content:
we have PO approval and rejection email template. we need to add the plant field in the template but it is not available in the data fields. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Supplier reconciliation line is split by profit center and tax characteristics in supplier invoice
entry.content:
During supplier invoice posting, the supplier reconciliation (vendor) line item is split into multiple lines instead of remaining as a single consolidated open item. The splitting occurs based on document splitting characteristics such as profit center and tax-related account assignments.

This can lead to unexpected document structures during Accounts Payable review and reporting.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Standard Hierarchy for Cost Center is not available in Post General Journal Entries app
entry.content:
In S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the Cost Center value help behaves differently across applications.

Some apps, such as Cash Journal, allow users to navigate and select Cost Centers using the Standard Hierarchy view. However, in the Post General Journal Entries app, the Cost Center value help only provides a flat search-based list without hierarchy navigation.

Users may expect consistent hierarchy-based selection behavior across apps and want to know whether this functionality can be enabled.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Pricing Error in converting exchange rate
entry.content: In my TDD to build a demo of ordering process for a customer, I am facing pricing error per the screen. Since configuration architect says it is only happening to Cty: Japan(JPY).  Please clarify how I go through this error.

entry.title: What is the difference between a review booklet and a report?
entry.content:
Our team is considering switching from query reports to review booklets.
Therefore, we have the following questions, and we would appreciate your guidance:
1. What are the differences between reports and booklets, and how does SAP intend them to be used?
2. How many of the current query reports/which areas of applications are planned to be replaced with review booklets? How long will the transition take?

entry.title: Set Posting Periods Automatically
entry.content:
We are considering the possibility of automating the opening of posting periods. We have noticed that there is an option in the Manage Posting Periods app to do this, but it is not compatible with special periods. In other words, this job may work well for most of the year, when special periods are not open. However, at the end of the year (December), when the finance team opens the special periods to post the adjustments, the job will fail with the following error:

Failed to schedule recurrence because the item contains special periods. Please set posting periods manually or schedule jobs one by one

We therefore understand that this functionality will only work if special periods are not used.

Are we correct? If so, is there any other alternative?
